CustomFieldValueETag.description: Strong revision tag required verbatim in If-Match before a mutation.

PlannedWorkETag.description: Strong schedule revision required verbatim in If-Match before replacement.

IdempotencyKey.description: Unique request key retained for seven days. Within that window, reuse with different data is rejected.
IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key

IfMatchCustomFieldValue.description: Exactly one strong ETag returned by the latest GET or mutation response. Wildcards, weak validators, and lists are rejected.
IfMatchCustomFieldValue.name: If-Match

IfMatchPlannedWork.description: Exactly one strong ETag returned by the latest task planned-work GET. Wildcards, weak validators, and lists are rejected.
IfMatchPlannedWork.name: If-Match

BadGateway.description: The cell-local application returned an invalid response.

Conflict.description: The request conflicts with the current resource state.

NotFound.description: The tenant-scoped resource does not exist.

PreconditionFailed.description: The resource changed since the supplied revision.

PreconditionRequired.description: A strong If-Match revision is required.

RateLimited.description: The credential or source exceeded its rate limit.

Retry-After.description: Minimum delay in seconds before retrying.

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Maximum requests in the current window.

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Requests remaining in the current window.

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix time in milliseconds when the current window resets.

ServiceUnavailable.description: A required cell-local dependency is unavailable.

Unauthorized.description: The bearer credential is missing, invalid, expired, or revoked.

ProjectTemplate.description: Safe project-template metadata. The captured project, list, and task snapshot, tenant fields, actor fields, and other storage internals are never exposed.

ProjectTemplateInstantiation.description: Credential-owned asynchronous instantiation status. Checkpoints, source snapshots, generated documents, tenant routing, runner state, and retry internals are never exposed.

Product.description: Product catalog entry. purchasePrice is finance-gated.

purchasePrice.description: Internal acquisition cost. Present only with products:finance:read.

ProjectStatement.description: Budget statements and purchasePrice are finance-gated. Internal workflow, order, cart, and budget-rollup fields are never part of this public DTO.

purchasePrice.description: Internal acquisition cost. Present only with project-statements:finance:read.

CustomFieldDefinitionCreate.description: The configuration discriminator must equal fieldType.

CustomFieldValueValue.description: Canonical value. The field definition selects the valid branch and applies tighter length, option, reference, and number constraints. Serialized input is limited to 256 KiB.

replayed.description: Whether the mutation was an idempotent canonical no-op.

signingSecret.description: Returned only by an idempotent webhook create response.

WebhookDelivery.description: Credential-owned webhook delivery metadata. Destination URLs, request and response payloads, headers, bodies, secrets, tenant routing, and retention fields are never exposed.

info.description: Stable, cell-aware TeamGrid API for service credentials and the TeamGrid CLI.
info.title: TeamGrid API v1

parameters.description: Filter by one or more change operations. Repeat the query parameter for multiple values.
parameters.name: operations

parameters.description: Filter by one or more public resource types. Repeat the query parameter for multiple values.
parameters.name: resourceTypes

parameters.description: Create an empty checkpoint at the latest committed cell sequence. Cannot be combined with cursor. Use this before a full resource snapshot, then poll with the returned cursor.
parameters.name: startAtLatest

nextCursor.description: Credential-bound checkpoint for the next poll. It is present even when this page is empty.

caughtUp.description: True when this page reaches its fixed watermark. False pages are always full.

200.description: A fixed-watermark change page and the checkpoint for the next poll.

410.description: The cursor is outside retained history or cell continuity cannot be proven. A full resynchronization is required.

parameters.description: Return archived resources instead of active resources.
parameters.name: archived

parameters.name: createdAtFrom

parameters.description: Include templates created at or before this time.
parameters.name: createdAtTo

parameters.description: Filter templates by their source project id.
parameters.name: originProjectId

get.description: The cell-local App re-authenticates the credential and verifies the projects.templates plan capability before this service reads only the tenant-scoped, metadata-only projection. Captured snapshot data is never selected or exposed.

200.description: An idempotent replay of an existing resource.

post.summary: Capture a project as a template
post.description: The cell-local App re-authenticates the credential, verifies tenant ownership and the projects.templates.add plan permission, snapshots the source project with bounded list/task limits, and applies credential-bound idempotency.

204.description: The project template was archived, or that state was already present.

get.description: The cell-local App re-authenticates the credential and verifies the projects.templates plan capability before a tenant-scoped metadata-only read. The captured snapshot is never selected or exposed.

post.description: The cell-local App re-authenticates the credential, verifies both required scopes, tenant ownership, projects.templates and projects.create plan permissions, validates every referenced resource, and starts a credential-owned asynchronous operation.

202.description: The asynchronous template instantiation was accepted.

Idempotency-Replayed.description: Whether this response replays the operation created for this key.

Location.description: Relative credential-owned polling URL for this operation.

get.description: Returns only an operation owned by the authenticated credential in its workspace. The cell-local App re-authenticates both project-templates:write and projects:write scopes before every poll.

parameters.description: Inclusive window start. Together with end, limited to 366 days and years 2000–2100.
parameters.name: start

parameters.description: Inclusive window end. Together with start, limited to 366 days and years 2000–2100.
parameters.name: end

parameters.description: Filter by task id.
parameters.name: taskId

parameters.description: Filter by project id.
parameters.name: projectId

parameters.description: Filter by user id.
parameters.name: userId

get.summary: List planned work in a bounded window
get.description: Returns a stable ascending keyset page from the credential cell. The cursor is bound to the workspace and complete filter set. Authorization filtering can produce an empty page with a non-null cursor.
Polls a credential-owned, workspace-owned asynchronous replacement operation. Tenant and cell routing internals are never projected.
Returns the task schedule and a strong revision ETag. Reads fail closed while a replacement overlaps the task.

put.description: Atomically compares the strong task schedule revision and accepts a credential-owned asynchronous replacement. The same Idempotency-Key and payload replay the original operation; a different payload conflicts.

202.description: The asynchronous schedule replacement was accepted or replayed.

Idempotency-Replayed.description: Whether this response replays the operation created for this key.

Location.description: Relative credential-owned polling URL for this operation.

200.description: An idempotent replay of an existing resource.

delete.description: The cell-local App re-authenticates the credential and additionally requires a target-domain scope selected by targetType: contacts:read/write, projects:read/write, project-statements:read/write, or tasks:read/write. Reading a contact, project, tag, or user reference field, and validating a newly set reference, also requires the matching contacts:read, projects:read, tags:read, or users:read scope. Invalid legacy values are classified without exposing their payload.

200.description: The value was cleared or an already-unset state was replayed.

get.description: The cell-local App re-authenticates the credential and additionally requires a target-domain scope selected by targetType: contacts:read/write, projects:read/write, project-statements:read/write, or tasks:read/write. Reading a contact, project, tag, or user reference field, and validating a newly set reference, also requires the matching contacts:read, projects:read, tags:read, or users:read scope. Invalid legacy values are classified without exposing their payload.

200.description: The current value state and its strong revision tag.

put.description: The cell-local App re-authenticates the credential and additionally requires a target-domain scope selected by targetType: contacts:read/write, projects:read/write, project-statements:read/write, or tasks:read/write. Reading a contact, project, tag, or user reference field, and validating a newly set reference, also requires the matching contacts:read, projects:read, tags:read, or users:read scope. Invalid legacy values are classified without exposing their payload.

200.description: The value was set or an identical canonical value was replayed.

Returns a credential-owned delivery after the cell-local App reapplies credential ownership and workspace isolation.

tags.description: Ordered, resumable cell-local resource metadata changes.
tags.name: Changes

tags.description: Metadata-only template lifecycle and credential-owned asynchronous instantiation. Source snapshots and runner internals stay private; every operation is forbidden in every MCP profile.
tags.name: Project Templates

tags.description: Catalog products. Archive is available; restore is intentionally absent because the current App domain has no public restore command.
tags.name: Products

tags.description: Hierarchical product groups. Parent validation is enforced in the App domain. Restore is intentionally absent until a real domain command exists.
tags.name: Product Groups

tags.description: Project revenue and cost statements. Budget entries and purchasePrice require finance scopes; internal rollups and workflow fields are never exposed. Restore is absent because the App has no standalone restore command.
tags.name: Project Statements

tags.description: Per-resource custom-field values with strong compare-and-set revisions. These operations are forbidden in every MCP profile.
tags.name: Custom Field Values

tags.description: Bounded cell-local workload reads and compare-and-set asynchronous schedule replacement. Every operation is conservatively forbidden in MCP profiles.
tags.name: Planned Work

tags.description: Credential-owned, metadata-only delivery history. The persisted states are delivering, retrying, failed, skipped, and succeeded; no synthetic stale or indeterminate states are inferred.
tags.name: Webhook Deliveries
